english.name: English
english.greeting: Hey, this is Sevyn, Sherrod's assistant. How can I help you?

spanish.name: Spanish
spanish.greeting: Hola, soy Sevyn, la asistente de Sherrod. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte?

french.name: French
french.greeting: Bonjour, c'est Sevyn, l'assistante de Sherrod. Comment puis-je vous aider?

portuguese.name: Portuguese
portuguese.greeting: Olá, sou Sevyn, assistente do Sherrod. Como posso ajudá-lo?

german.name: German
german.greeting: Hallo, hier ist Sevyn, Sherrods Assistentin. Wie kann ich Ihnen helfen?

italian.name: Italian
italian.greeting: Ciao, sono Sevyn, l'assistente di Sherrod. Come posso aiutarti?

japanese.name: Japanese
japanese.greeting: こんにちは、シェロッドのアシスタント、セブンです。ご用件をお伺いします。

chinese.name: Chinese (Mandarin)
chinese.greeting: 你好，我是Sevyn，Sherrod的助理。有什么可以帮您的？

korean.name: Korean
korean.greeting: 안녕하세요, Sherrod의 비서 Sevyn입니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?

dutch.name: Dutch
dutch.greeting: Hallo, dit is Sevyn, Sherrod's assistent. Hoe kan ik u helpen?
